untranslatable_reason: This is a STOP LOSS PLACEMENT rule, not a position sizing rule. It describes where to set stops (MAE + 1.5×σ) to avoid premature exits, but does not specify how much capital/risk to allocate per trade or how to scale position size. Position sizing determines contract quantity or % of equity risked; stop placement is a risk management parameter that feeds INTO sizing calculations but is not itself a sizing method.
